title: Shanks Saves Luffy from the Sea
description: On pages 42–44, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: The danger reaches the water, where Shanks saves Luffy and pays a permanent price for that rescue.

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: AND NOBODY WOULD EVER EXPECT A MOUNTAIN BANDIT TO HIDE OUT AT SEA!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: BROUGHT YOU ALONG AS A HOSTAGE...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: BUT I NO LONGER HAVE A USE FOR YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've already killed $6 people who were foolish enough to make me mad, what's one more?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND I DIDN'T EVEN GET ONE PUNCH IN! DARN IT!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: Did you see the look on those pirates' faces?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BROKE A BOTTLE OVER HIS HEAD, AND NOT ONE WORD OF PROTEST!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: COWARDS LIKE THAT MAKE ME SICK!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Take back what you said about shanks!! He's not a coward!!

summary: The bandit threat turns deadly, and Shanks saves Luffy from the sea. The rescue shows the seriousness behind Shanks’ carefree attitude.
